raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding the failure of Citibank , N.A . to provide access to my credit card account statements and transaction history despite my enrollment in electronic statements and repeated requests for copies of my statements.

I am enrolled in electronic statements. However, Citibanks online system has not allowed me to access my statements. I have made multiple requests to Citibank to provide copies of my statements, and they have failed to provide complete records.

This has prevented me from reviewing my account activity and identifying potentially unauthorized charges. I need access to all statements and transaction history from 2022 through the present in order to properly review charges and identify any additional unauthorized or fraudulent transactions.

By failing to provide statements and account records, Citibank has effectively prevented me from : Monitoring my account for unauthorized activity Timely disputing transactions Verifying recurring billing authorizations Protecting my financial information Consumers can not reasonably exercise their billing dispute rights if they are denied access to their account statements and transaction history. 

Additionally, I have already identified disputed charges related to XXXX merchant descriptors, and my inability to review historical statements raises concerns that additional unauthorized or improperly authorized recurring charges may exist.

I am requesting that Citibank : Immediately provide complete account statements from XX/XX/year> through present Provide complete transaction history in electronic format Confirm that no additional statements or transaction records are being withheld Ensure continued reliable electronic access to my statements going forward Confirm that any dispute deadlines impacted by their failure to provide statements will be honored and extended as necessary I am submitting this complaint through the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau because Citibanks failure to provide statements and account access interferes with my ability to monitor my account and exercise my federal consumer billing rights. 

Despite repeated requests, Citibank has failed to provide complete statements, forcing me to attempt to reconstruct account activity without reliable documentation from the creditor.
